hero_subtitle: I transform problems into thoughtful, scalable solutions. One technical move at a time.
tooltip_static_site: This site is statically generated and served at the edge.
intro_text_1: I find the problems your users feel but can't explain, and I solve them at the system level. I'm a Full Stack Web Developer with
intro_text_2: of experience building SaaS products end to end. I take a product-first approach, shipping thoughtful, scalable solutions before the problems become crises.
